column28: Belief and Values section makes too many presumptions (i.e., the way religion/soulmates/politics is described is simplistic and imposes a particular worldview on these complex topics). My suggestion: Interview (with your target audience) is a better methodology to build some hypotheses, then use the survey to size and validate. If that is too much trouble, then you could allow some of the questions to have an others answer (to allow for nuance on more complex topics)
